title: Acana Ant Killer Pack of 3 - Powerful Indoor Solution, Nests Destroyer, 3 Bait Stations containing Real Honey, Effective Pest Control Solution for Home
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: KILLS ANTS AND THE QUEEN - Our 'honey' based ant bait contains a proven food that ants love to eat with insecticide that ants take back to their nest and share wih the other ants and the queen.
FOR USE INDOORS - Place the bait stations on a flat surface near ant nests or on paths that ants use to enter the room.
ELIMINATE THE COLONY WITHIN 21-28 DAYS - Effective colony elimination, ensuring thorough and lasting control of infestations.
SIMPLE TO ACTIVATE - Easy to actviate the trap ready for the ants to start collecting the bait. Keep out of sunlight and heat sources.
FOR BEST RESULTS - For best results use any baits early in the season, start at the end of March or early April before ants are visible.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Contains Real Honey 2 3x Bait Stations
